channel.desc: News for Punjabis, by Punjabis. World Punjabi TV is your 24/7 channel for news, interviews, and live events, including daily broadcasts from Gurudwara Nadha Sahib. Your connection to home, wherever you are.

Living India News is a popular channel that offers a wide range of news coverage, including Punjab, national, and international news. What sets us apart is our engaging debates on contemporary topics and special series shows that are both informative and interesting. News on specific topics, we've got you covered. From business and markets to technology and sports, Living India News provides in-depth coverage of current events. Our debates and discussions feature expert analysis and diverse perspectives, making them a great resource for staying informed.
Gurbani Tv Channel with non-stop Kirtan, Kathas and Sikh Religious Channel.

TV Punjab provides authentic and credible news and high-quality entertainment content featuring Punjabi language. Television Punjab content is designed to reflex the various cultural elements of Punjab.
Saga Music is a 24/7 channel dedicated to serving Punjabi music content globally, showcasing a diverse array of genres including Folk, Pop, Sufi, Hip Hop, and Rap.

We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

A magical world awaits you, a single destination where lives glamour, fantasies and dreams. A world so colourful and real where you can literally touch, feel and become a part of the stories you see, a world of high definition. This perfect place of entertainment is called, Bollywood HD, a channel which offers treats from the world’s biggest producer of movies, Bollywood, all at your fingertips, exclusively for you. Tune in to experience larger than life blockbusters stories every single day, all year around. This one stop starry shop not just offers hot and sizzling premieres every month, but also gives you an upclose & personal peak into the gossip and news on the lives of the glamour Bollywood celebrities. Leave your worries behind and escape into the starlit world of Bollywood HD today.

Willow Sports is the free home for cricket in North America. The best of live and on-demand action from around the world is available, from ICC World Cups to the IPL. Also, other action packed live sports that will have you on the edge of your seat.

FAST moving 24/7 Sports News Network, daily breaking news about global sports, with interviews, features and highlights of the biggest sports events from over 200 sports federations. Covers sports from US and all around the world, EPL, NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, golf, tennis, cricket, etc.
A free, 24/7 English language LIVE sports, news, analysis and highlights network that brings everyone closer to the game.
SportsTVplus - All sports all the time 24-7 auto racing, BMX, basketball, beach volleyball, combat sports, football, golf, soccer, and many more. Find your game, highlights & news right here!

TNA Wrestling puts the spotlight on 20+ years of professional wrestling action, featuring addictive storylines, awe-inspiring athleticism and larger-than-life personalities. Relive all-time classics, modern masterpieces, plus original series.

FTF Sports is an emerging worldwide network offering engaging video content established to serve the passionate fan's appreciation for competition, sportsmanship, and performance. FTF Sports features a 24/7 broadcast, including live games & events, interviews, predictions, analysis, and a variety of dynamic, original programming.

Chardikla Time TV North America brings you 24/7 Punjabi news, entertainment, and cultural programming, serving the vibrant Punjabi and South Asian communities across North America. Experience exclusive coverage of major community events, including Bangla Sahib, Patna Sahib, Yuba City Nagar Kirtan, Los Angeles Nagar Kirtan, Holla Mohalla Riverside, Boston Bhangra, Sikh Day Parade New York, South Asian Showdown, Kabaddi, Soccer, and Field Hockey. Chardikla Time TV North America is your go-to destination for authentic Punjabi content. Watch live now and stay connected to your roots!

Chardikla Time TV is a top-ranking Free-to-Air Infotainment channel from Punjab, known for its live Gurbani telecast from sacred sites. It features news analysis, talk shows, crime series, documentaries, and social discussions. Catering to all age groups, it offers diverse content and strong engagement, making it a trusted choice for advertisers and viewers worldwide.

Chardikla Gurbaani TV, with the motto “A Bliss to Humanity,” is a 24×7 Free Sikh Devotional Channel available globally on various platforms. It features live telecasts from Takhat Sri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib, Gurdwara Sri Bangla Sahib, and special broadcasts from North America. Dedicated to Sikh teachings, history, Katha, Kirtan, and Dhadhi shows, it spreads the message of Gurbani worldwide.

programme.title: Insaf Ka Tarazu
programme.desc: Ramesh, a multi-millionaire, falls madly in love with Bharti. In the turnout of events, Bharti kills Ramesh. Watch the heart wrenching drama to know what compels her to take this dire step.

programme.title: Anhonee
programme.desc: Dr Rekha admits a patient, Sunil, in her mental hospital and soon, he responds to the treatment and recovers. They fall in love with each other but everything is not as it seems to be.

programme.title: Justice Chaudhury
programme.desc: Justice Chaudhury is forced to go against his principles when criminal Shanker Singh's brother Jai Singh harasses his speech-impaired daughter Lakshmi.

programme.title: Numbri Aadmi
programme.desc: Shankar, a noble thief, attempts to kill Rana, his father's murderer, in a bid to seek revenge. However, Rana has powerful friends who stand in Shankar's way.

programme.title: Rootha Na Karo
programme.desc: Naina loves Sudhir on the sly, and is jealous of Sudhir's love for Neeta. When Sudhi does not reciprocate her love, she decides to create all kinds of misunderstandings for the two.

programme.title: Patthar Aur Payal
programme.desc: A bandit decides to change his ways and lead a normal life after falling in love. However, his resentful brother threatens his chance at redemption by holding his loved ones hostage.

programme.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programme.desc: Jai and Munish's friendship is ruined when both of them fall in love with the same girl, Meena. Things take a turn when Munish finds out Jai was involved in the case of a faulty railway bridge.

programme.title: Meet Mere Man Ke
programme.desc: Thakur Jagat Pratap Singh, a man of high principles falls in love with a girl and wants to marry her. However, the difference in their social statuses threatens to maim his plans.

programme.title: Khud-Daar
programme.desc: Hari is forced to marry Seema, who dislikes his stepbrothers, Govind and Rajesh. When he goes to Mumbai, she displaces them to become beggars. However, destiny reunites them with Hari in a courtroom.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
programme.desc: Sunil, a promiscuous navy officer, falls in love with Anuradha and introduces her to his family. However, an admirer of Anuradha tries to deceive Sunil by informing him that she is a single mother.

programme.title: Brahmachari
programme.desc: Abandoned as a child, Brahmachari lives in a mortgaged house with twelve young orphans. He saves a woman from dying and she changes his life forever. But first she has to deal with her own affairs.

programme.title: Ittefaq 1969
programme.desc: Dilip, who loves his passion more than his wife, threatens to kill her if she harms his paintings. Later, when his wife is found murdered, he is accused of the crime and sent to a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Hamraaz
programme.desc: Kumar, a stage actor, falls in love with Meena and gets married to her. Things take a turn when one day she is found murdered and he becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Kudrat 1981
programme.desc: Chandramukhi visits Shimla and learns that she is a reincarnation of Paro, a girl who was raped and murdered. Plagued by her dark past, she attempts to bring the culprits to justice.

programme.title: Yaraana
programme.desc: JB, a borderline psychopath, is attracted to Lalita, a beautiful young woman. He forces her to marry him but she runs away on her wedding day by feigning unconsciousness.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: After Mahesh abandons Meena and their baby, she is compelled to desert the child to fend for himself. However, he gets adopted by a kind Muslim man and grows up to soon cross paths with his past.

programme.title: Khud-Daar
programme.desc: Hari is forced to marry Seema, who dislikes his stepbrothers, Govind and Rajesh. When he goes to Mumbai, she displaces them to become beggars. However, destiny reunites them with Hari in a courtroom.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan

programme.title: Brahmachari

programme.title: Diljalaa
programme.desc: A girl's father selects a groom for her who happens to be the son of his employer but on the day of engagement, she not only rejects but also humiliates him.

programme.title: Dushman Duniya Ka
programme.desc: Mahesh, an honest man, is shocked to learn that his son, Lucky, has been using recreational drugs. Lucky promises to kick the habit but circumstances push him towards the world of drugs once again.

programme.title: Dahleez
programme.desc: Naini and Shekhar love each other, but due to a misunderstanding, she decides to leave him and marry another man. However, her whole world comes crashing down when Shekhar reappears in her life.

programme.title: Insaaf Apne Lahoo Se
programme.desc: Mahendra Pratap marries Geeta, but asks Devilal, her first son, to leave the house. Later, Geeta gets arrested for murder due to her husband's false testimony and gives birth to another son in prison.

programme.desc: Mahendra Pratap marries Geeta, but asks Devilal, her first son, to leave the house. Later, Geeta gets arrested for murder due to her husband's false testimony and gives birth to another son in prison.

programme.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.title: Raju Chacha
programme.desc: Raju is hired to pose as uncle to three orphaned kids in order to usurp their inheritance. But he changes his mind after falling in love with their governess and decides to fight the greedy relatives.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: Three friend residents in the 'C' block of a Mumbai Apartment complex with monetary issues decide to create a fake organization 'C Company' in order to extort 1 Crore Rupees but thimgs goes wrong.

programme.title: Mission Istaanbul
programme.desc: A news reporter must uncover the secret on the 13th floor of a News Station.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Two close friends, Yash and Raja, share a passion for cars and beautiful women. They both falls in love with the same women.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: An elderly couple wish their children to care for them in their old age. But their children see and treat them as a burden, and they must struggle to regain their worth and dignity to themselves and others.

programme.title: Zameer: The Fire Within
programme.desc: Pooja gets married to Suraj but feels guilty for separating him from Supriya, his former fiancee. When Suraj learns the truth he abandons her, oblivious to the fact that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
programme.desc: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

programme.title: EMI: Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.
